name: ASRock Z690 Pro RS ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700 - Intel Z690 Chipset - Support DDR4-5000(OC) - 1x PCIe 5.0 x16 - 1x PCIe 4.0 x16 - 3x M.2 Socket3 - M.2 Key-E for WiFi - USB 3.2 Gen2x2 Front Type-C - HDMI - DisplayPort - Dragon 2.5G LAN
shortName: ASRock Z690 Pro RS ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700 - Intel Z690
description: Intel Z690 ATX motherboard with PCIe 5.0 support and DDR4 compatibility for mid-to-high-end builds.
